chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 07 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 737/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.12.2025. Mr. Faisal Ali Raza Bhatti, Advocate for appellant. Mr. Farman Ali, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Qurban Ali Baat, Advocate for respondent. = For reasons to be recorded, the 1st appeal is dismissed alongwith pending application. JUDGE Tufail
